subject: Delay Notice - Shipment SH-3001
body:
Dear Customer,

We regret to inform you that shipment SH-3001 carrying Steel Coils from Mumbai, India is experiencing a delay of approximately 5 days due to customs inspection hold at Suez Canal. We are working to minimize the impact.

Updated ETA: 2026-07-20

Best regards,
Maersk Operations Team

subject: URGENT: Shipment SH-3005 Disruption
body:
ALERT: Shipment SH-3005 (Carbon Fiber Sheets, Kuehne+Nagel) is currently stalled at Port of Singapore — awaiting berth. Root cause: port congestion. Estimated delay: 4 business days. Revised delivery: 2026-07-26.

Please advise on priority handling.

Regards,
Kuehne+Nagel Control Tower
